title: Berlin Photo Spots - Quick Summary
items: **The best Berlin photos usually need layers:** old and new, river and skyline, monument and street life in one frame.
**Start near Alexanderplatz and walk west:** Rotes Rathaus, St. Mary's Church, Marienviertel, Liebknecht Bridge, Museum Island and Hackesche Höfe can fit into one strong photo walk.
**Liebknecht Bridge is the best single stop** for Spree reflections, Berliner Dom, Humboldt Forum and TV Tower layers.
**Hackesche Höfe works best in the morning** when the courtyards are quieter and the Jugendstil details are easier to frame.
**Stay flexible around Rathausforum and Marx-Engels-Forum** because the area is being redesigned and exact sightlines can change.
